003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025/**
026 * Represents an HTTP <c>Proxy-Authenticate</c> header.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Request authentication to access the proxy.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
033 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
034 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
035 * (and possibly earlier).
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
039 * </ul>
040 *
041 * @since 9.2.1
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "java:S1192" // Duplicated "value" literals are HTTP header component keys; a constant would obscure the header grammar.
045})
046public class ProxyAuthenticate extends HttpStringHeader {
047
048   /** The header name */
049   public static final String NAME = "Proxy-Authenticate";
050
051   /**
052    * Constructor with an eager value.
053    *
054    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
055    */
056   public ProxyAuthenticate(String value) {
057      super(NAME, value);
058   }
059
060   /**
061    * Constructor with a lazy value supplier.
062    *
063    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the header value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
064    */
065   public ProxyAuthenticate(Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
066      super(NAME, valueSupplier);
067   }
068
069   /**
070    * Static factory method with an eager value.
071    *
072    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
073    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
074    */
075   public static ProxyAuthenticate of(String value) {
076      return new ProxyAuthenticate(value);
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Static factory method with a lazy value supplier.
081    *
082    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the header value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
083    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
084    */
085   public static ProxyAuthenticate of(Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
086      return new ProxyAuthenticate(valueSupplier);
087   }
088
089   /**
090    * Creates a new empty {@link Builder}.
091    *
092    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
093    */
094   public static Builder create() {
095      return new Builder();
096   }
097
098   /**
099    * Creates a {@link Builder} pre-populated with a <c>Basic</c> challenge for the given realm.
100    *
101    * @param realm The protection space realm. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
102    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
103    */
104   public static Builder basic(String realm) {
105      return create().basic(realm);
106   }
107
108   /**
109    * Creates a {@link Builder} pre-populated with a <c>Bearer</c> challenge.
110    *
111    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
112    */
113   public static Builder bearer() {
114      return create().bearer();
115   }
116
117   /**
118    * Creates a {@link Builder} pre-populated with a <c>Digest</c> challenge.
119    *
120    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
121    */
122   public static Builder digest() {
123      return create().digest();
124   }
125
126   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
127   // Inner types
128   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
129
130   /**
131    * Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP <c>Proxy-Authenticate</c> challenge value.
132    *
133    * <p>
134    * Composes the <c>scheme [ 1*SP #auth-param ]</c> challenge form defined by
135    * <a class='doclink' href='https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7235#section-4.3'>RFC 7235 §4.3</a>.  Typed setters
136    * cover the common Basic / Bearer / Digest auth-params and apply the correct quoting (quoted-string vs token);
137    * {@link #param(String, String)} is a generic escape hatch so new params never require an API change.  The scheme
138    * presets ({@link #basic(String)} / {@link #bearer()} / {@link #digest()}) overwrite the scheme; auth-param setters
139    * overwrite a previously-set param of the same name while preserving its original position.
140    *
141    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
142    * <p class='bjava'>
143    *    String <jv>value</jv> = ProxyAuthenticate.<jsm>create</jsm>()
144    *       .digest()
145    *       .realm(<js>"http-auth@example.org"</js>)
146    *       .qop(<js>"auth"</js>, <js>"auth-int"</js>)
147    *       .nonce(<js>"7ypf/xlj9XXwfDPEoM4URrv/xwf94BcCAzFZH4GiTo0v"</js>)
148    *       .algorithm(<js>"SHA-256"</js>)
149    *       .build();
150    *    <jc>// =&gt; "Digest realm=\"http-auth@example.org\", qop=\"auth,auth-int\", nonce=\"...\", algorithm=SHA-256"</jc>
151    * </p>
152    *
153    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
154    *    <li class='jc'>{@link ProxyAuthenticate}
155    *    <li class='extlink'><a class='doclink' href='https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7235'>RFC 7235 - HTTP/1.1 Authentication</a>
156    * </ul>
157    *
158    * @since 10.0.0
159    */
160   public static class Builder {
161
162      private String scheme;
163      private final Map<String,String> params = new LinkedHashMap<>();
164
165      /**
166       * Sets the authentication scheme (e.g. <js>"Basic"</js>, <js>"Bearer"</js>, <js>"Digest"</js>).
167       *
168       * @param value The scheme name. Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
169       * @return This object.
170       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code value} is <jk>null</jk> or blank.
171       */
172      public Builder scheme(String value) {
173         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
174         var v = value.trim();
175         if (v.isEmpty())
176            throw iaex("scheme must not be blank");
177         scheme = v;
178         return this;
179      }
180
181      /**
182       * Sets the scheme to <c>Basic</c> and the <c>realm</c> auth-param.
183       *
184       * @param realm The protection space realm. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
185       * @return This object.
186       */
187      public Builder basic(String realm) {
188         return scheme("Basic").realm(realm);
189      }
190
191      /**
192       * Sets the scheme to <c>Bearer</c>.
193       *
194       * @return This object.
195       */
196      public Builder bearer() {
197         return scheme("Bearer");
198      }
199
200      /**
201       * Sets the scheme to <c>Digest</c>.
202       *
203       * @return This object.
204       */
205      public Builder digest() {
206         return scheme("Digest");
207      }
208
209      /**
210       * Sets the <c>realm</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
211       *
212       * @param value The realm value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
213       * @return This object.
214       */
215      public Builder realm(String value) {
216         return quotedParam("realm", value);
217      }
218
219      /**
220       * Sets the <c>charset</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
221       *
222       * @param value The charset (e.g. <js>"UTF-8"</js>). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
223       * @return This object.
224       */
225      public Builder charset(String value) {
226         return quotedParam("charset", value);
227      }
228
229      /**
230       * Sets the <c>qop</c> auth-param to a comma-separated, quoted list of quality-of-protection tokens.
231       *
232       * @param values The qop tokens (e.g. <js>"auth"</js>, <js>"auth-int"</js>). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
233       * @return This object.
234       */
235      public Builder qop(String...values) {
236         assertArgNotNull("values", values);
237         return quotedParam("qop", String.join(",", values));
238      }
239
240      /**
241       * Sets the <c>nonce</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
242       *
243       * @param value The server nonce. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
244       * @return This object.
245       */
246      public Builder nonce(String value) {
247         return quotedParam("nonce", value);
248      }
249
250      /**
251       * Sets the <c>opaque</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
252       *
253       * @param value The opaque value to be echoed back by the client. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
254       * @return This object.
255       */
256      public Builder opaque(String value) {
257         return quotedParam("opaque", value);
258      }
259
260      /**
261       * Sets the <c>algorithm</c> auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
262       *
263       * @param value The algorithm (e.g. <js>"MD5"</js>, <js>"SHA-256"</js>). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
264       * @return This object.
265       */
266      public Builder algorithm(String value) {
267         return tokenParam("algorithm", value);
268      }
269
270      /**
271       * Sets the <c>domain</c> auth-param to a space-separated, quoted list of URIs.
272       *
273       * @param values The protection space URIs. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
274       * @return This object.
275       */
276      public Builder domain(String...values) {
277         assertArgNotNull("values", values);
278         return quotedParam("domain", String.join(" ", values));
279      }
280
281      /**
282       * Sets the <c>stale</c> auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
283       *
284       * @param value <jk>true</jk> if the previous request's nonce was stale.
285       * @return This object.
286       */
287      public Builder stale(boolean value) {
288         return tokenParam("stale", Boolean.toString(value));
289      }
290
291      /**
292       * Sets the <c>error</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string; RFC 6750 Bearer).
293       *
294       * @param value The error code (e.g. <js>"invalid_token"</js>). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
295       * @return This object.
296       */
297      public Builder error(String value) {
298         return quotedParam("error", value);
299      }
300
301      /**
302       * Sets the <c>error_description</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string; RFC 6750 Bearer).
303       *
304       * @param value The human-readable error description. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
305       * @return This object.
306       */
307      public Builder errorDescription(String value) {
308         return quotedParam("error_description", value);
309      }
310
311      /**
312       * Generic escape hatch for setting any auth-param by name, rendered as a quoted-string.
313       *
314       * <p>
315       * Replaces any previously-registered value for the same param while preserving its original position.
316       *
317       * @param name The auth-param name. Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
318       * @param value The auth-param value (quoted automatically). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
319       * @return This object.
320       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code name} is <jk>null</jk> or blank.
321       */
322      public Builder param(String name, String value) {
323         return quotedParam(name, value);
324      }
325
326      private Builder quotedParam(String name, String value) {
327         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
328         params.put(cleanName(name), q(value));
329         return this;
330      }
331
332      private Builder tokenParam(String name, String value) {
333         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
334         params.put(cleanName(name), value);
335         return this;
336      }
337
338      private static String cleanName(String name) {
339         assertArgNotNull("name", name);
340         var n = name.trim();
341         if (n.isEmpty())
342            throw iaex("auth-param name must not be blank");
343         return n;
344      }
345
346      private static String q(String value) {
347         var sb = new StringBuilder(value.length() + 2);
348         sb.append('"');
349         for (var i = 0; i < value.length(); i++) {
350            var c = value.charAt(i);
351            if (c == '\\' || c == '"')
352               sb.append('\\');
353            sb.append(c);
354         }
355         sb.append('"');
356         return sb.toString();
357      }
358
359      /**
360       * Builds the rendered <c>Proxy-Authenticate</c> challenge value.
361       *
362       * <p>
363       * Returns an empty string when no scheme or params have been registered.
364       *
365       * @return The header value. Never <jk>null</jk>.
366       */
367      public String build() {
368         if (scheme == null && params.isEmpty())
369            return "";
370         var sb = new StringBuilder();
371         if (scheme != null)
372            sb.append(scheme);
373         if (! params.isEmpty()) {
374            if (scheme != null)
375               sb.append(' ');
376            var parts = new ArrayList<String>(params.size());
377            params.forEach((k, v) -> parts.add(k + "=" + v));
378            sb.append(String.join(", ", parts));
379         }
380         return sb.toString();
381      }
382
383      /**
384       * Builds a {@link ProxyAuthenticate} header bean directly from this builder.
385       *
386       * @return A {@link ProxyAuthenticate} carrying {@link #build()}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
387       */
388      public ProxyAuthenticate toHeader() {
389         return ProxyAuthenticate.of(build());
390      }
391
392      @Override
393      public String toString() {
394         return build();
395      }
396   }
397}
